name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: A major step forward on Iran
body:
Friend,

Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed the Iran Nuclear Agreement Review Act, which requires President Obama to submit any deal with Iran regarding its nuclear program to the Congress for review. **Now, President Obama MUST sign it when the bill arrives on his desk.**

[**Click here to sign the petition**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27788913:26717284040:m:1:877327319:EE2E9E2AF057664D8BE64AFE146CA742:r) and urge the President to sign this legislation to ensure the American people have a chance to understand the details of any deal with Iran.

Thanks again,

Lindsey

* * *
**Begin forwarded message:**

**From:** Senator Lindsey Graham
**Date:** Friday, May 8th 2015 11:21:05 AM
**Subject:** A major step forward on Iran

| |

---
---
|
**Friend, we took a major step forward yesterday in protecting America's national security and preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons.**

**On Thursday, the U.S. Senate approved, by an overwhelming vote of 98-1, legislation I helped write that says: Obama cannot obligate the United States to any nuclear deal with Iran until your elected representatives have a chance to review it first.**

The bill will now head to the House of Representatives and, hopefully, on to President Obama, who has begrudgingly agreed to sign it.

**Friend, we know Iran cannot be trusted.** With passage of this legislation, the American people will have the opportunity to understand the details of any deal that may be entered into with the Iranians regarding their nuclear program.

I believe any deal should be verifiable and include conditions to ensure Iran never acquires a nuclear weapon. **I cannot think of a worse scenario for our national security than a bad deal with Iran.**

If you agree, then **[I hope you will sign the petition urging the House to act quickly and the President to sign the bill into law. Click here to do so](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27788913:26717284040:m:1:877327319:EE2E9E2AF057664D8BE64AFE146CA742:r)**.

Thank you for your commitment to our nation's security.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

PS. As one of the primary authors of the Iranian legislation, I'm incredibly pleased this day has finally arrived. Yesterday's 98-1 vote was a huge victory for our national security, but we must keep up the pressure! **[If you agree Congress must review and vote on any deal President Obama negotiates with Iran about their nuclear program, then I hope you will add your name right now to this important petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27788913:26717284040:m:1:877327319:EE2E9E2AF057664D8BE64AFE146CA742:r)**.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27788913:26717284040:m:1:877327319:EE2E9E2AF057664D8BE64AFE146CA742:r)
|

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is7mAC-1xN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7mAC-1xN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7mAC-1xN)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: we're short -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

We're short.

I was talking with our political team this morning, and **we 're still 1,973 supporters short of our mid-month goal.**

**Hitting this goal is so important that a group of donors has stepped up and pledged $5 for every person who adds their name to our ranks before midnight Saturday.**
**Mid Month Goal:**
**One Signature = $5**
**Add your name now**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3340:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).

The single most important thing you can do right now is add your name to our ranks, and help us hit our goal: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/add-your-name/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3341:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

**All you need to do right now is add your name.** Since we've been traveling this country, hundreds of thousands of people have stepped up to join our ranks, but I didn't see your name on that list.

[**Can you add your name right now so I know I can count on you as we move forward?**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3342:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Please hurry, time is running out. We only have hours left to hit this goal, so step up now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/add-your-name/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3343:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you for your time and for standing with us.

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3344:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=416&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Will you leave a comment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2NTg5NTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxNDE5OTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Peter,

Under the Obama administration, we've seen the federal government grow in size and scope while the American people have fallen further behind under mounting taxes, burdensome regulations, and rising healthcare costs. It's time for a new direction.

Our American Revival was founded to advance policies that will help us build a more responsive, accountable government, and your involvement is crucial to our success.

Will you leave a comment and let us know how you think we can get America back on track?

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2NTg5NTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxNDE5OTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Your input and ideas will help us craft solutions to the challenges facing our nation. [Take a moment to let us know what you think and help us restore back to the American people.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2NTg5NTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxNDE5OTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Scott Walker
__
__

**

****
**

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/3943739/3964610174/VEsH/ "http://vanhollen.org?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")
Hi there -- I just wanted to make sure you saw this message. We're so close to hitting our goal of people from the Maryland area who have signed, we need just 29 more signatures.

[**Stand with Chris to demand transparency by ending secret money >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437cb/3964610174/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")

I know having you on our side means a lot to him.

Thanks,

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager

\--original message--
Friend,
As you may have heard by now, I am running for the U.S. Senate. I know it will be a hard-fought race. Sadly, we also know it could be record-breaking for the amount of money spent.
This year marked the fifth anniversary of Citizens United - one of the worst decisions in the Supreme Court's history. All of this secret outside money is quite literally poisoning our political system.
We may not be able to overturn Citizens United today but we can demand that these secret donors stop hiding and tell us who they are.
**[That 's where you come in: We have set a goal to have 150 more people from the Maryland area stand with me to tell donors to come out of the shadows. Please add your name to stand with me in demanding transparency by ending secret money.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437de/3964610174/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")**
That's why we reintroduced the DISCLOSE Act and urged the President to issue an Executive Order to require government contractors to disclose their campaign finance spending. We believe that anyone who feels strongly enough in support to provide tens of millions in a political race should be willing to put their name on that investment.
We all have the right to know who is funding these shadowy attack ads that want to drown out our voices.
[**Add your name to ask secret donors to come out of the shadows. Join us by adding your name in support. Stand with me now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437d5/3964610174/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437e8/3964610174/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")
I am proud to have you as a supporter. That's why I want your name alongside mine standing up to these secret donors. [**Please add your name now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437fe/3964610174/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")
Thank you for all that you do,
Chris

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e40/70cc2804/47850611/39437f4/3964610174/VEsB/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+httpactionvanhollenorgunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em051315&source=em051315")
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate

I know it will be a hard-fought race. Sadly, we also know it could be record-breaking for the amount of money spent. This year marked the fifth anniversary of Citizens United - one of the worst decisions in the Supreme Court's history. All of this secret outside money is quite literally poisoning our political system. We may not be able to overturn Citizens United today but we can demand that these secret donors stop hiding and tell us who they are. "" That's why we reintroduced the DISCLOSE Act and urged the President to issue an Executive Order to require government contractors to disclose their campaign finance spending. We believe that anyone who feels strongly enough in support to provide tens of millions in a political race should be willing to put their name on that investment. name: Jessica Morales Rocketto, Hillary for America
subject: It’s simple -- hit reply
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
You could send the next email like this. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2NjA1OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNDUwODk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

What if you had a chance to share your story with the Hillary for America community in an email like this one?

Here's my story:

I've known I was going to organize for Hillary for as long as I can remember. I announced to my parents that I was going to be the first female president -- or Hillary Clinton would be, and I would help elect her.

I can't tell you what a dream come true it is to finally be here, and how excited I am to help people all across the country get involved in this campaign in any way they can. What I love about organizing is that it doesn't matter where you're from or what your background is. Everyone can make a call, knock on a door, or just bring dinner and a good joke to a group of fellow volunteers.

That's why I'm here. Why are you?

**Reply to this email and tell us why you're a part of this campaign and what you're excited about.**

From the moment you decided to support Hillary, you became an important part of this campaign. So I want to know when that happened -- how did you get here, and more importantly, why?

This could be your chance to decide what shows up in the email inboxes of people all over the country. You could inspire someone to knock on some doors, pick up the phone, or chip in a few bucks. Maybe someone on the other side of the country has the same concerns or is inspired by the same things that inspire you.

**Reply to this email and share why you're here -- whatever it is, I want to hear it, my team wants to hear it, and others do, too.**

Thanks -- and don't forget to come out to an event!

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Director of Digital Organizing
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2NjA1OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNDUwODk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI2NjA1OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNDUwODk3S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2NjA1OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNDUwODk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
